'''ChoFï''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was an ardent supporter of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] since the beginnings of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}
